title: Script Question
wikitext:
[]: Script Question             Quote Post by ancapevageek » Tue Nov 20, 2012 9:30 pm Was wondering if the content in this photo is true. Never heard it before, and was obviously skeptical. SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Tue Nov 20, 2012 9:33 pm I seriously doubt that it is.

[]:             Quote Post by JoeD80 » Tue Nov 20, 2012 10:01 pm Eva was moved to a primetime slot

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Nov 20, 2012 11:19 pm I don't know that it was at any point planned to write it into the TV series, but it has been suggested that EoE implies that it occurred - running off the line of logic that, in EoE, the pre-Instrumentality scene in which they're shown having sex is not made up out of the whole cloth but rather, like the cut immediately following (the one where she kicks him), is Shinji and Asuka's mutual reimagining of something that actually happened. Don't think I buy it, but it's interesting to think about.

[]:             Quote Post by EvangelionFan » Wed Nov 21, 2012 12:47 am ...and even then, just because we're shown Asuka lying on top of Shinji with that face , it isn't proof that they actually stuck it in.

[]:             Quote Post by Redtophat » Wed Nov 21, 2012 12:52 am EvangelionFan wrote: ...and even then, just because we're shown Asuka lying on top of Shinji with that face , it isn't proof that they actually stuck it in.

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Wed Nov 21, 2012 2:08 am Considering Asuka and Shinji's mental state during and around those episodes, i find it extremely unlikely that they would be in the mood for any physical intimacy, and that's leaving aside their usual fears and issues with connecting to others. ...and even then, just because we're shown Asuka lying on top of Shinji with that face, it isn't proof that they actually stuck it in.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 21, 2012 2:10 am Related http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/8053/Did-Shinji-impregnate-Asuka/ http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6123 http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=3994

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Wed Nov 21, 2012 2:15 am Mr. Tines wrote: http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=6123

[]:             Quote Post by Fireball » Wed Nov 21, 2012 2:28 am Yeah, they had a lot of boom-boom and sucky-sucky for five dorrar. I remember that thread on /a/. The guy was trolling pretty good.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Nov 21, 2012 2:54 am Dream wrote: Now that you mention it, it makes me wonder from where that scene comes from within the character's minds. I don't think it comes from the memory of Asuka or Shinji, so...

[]:             Quote Post by Dream » Wed Nov 21, 2012 3:54 am Mr. Tines wrote: Just as with the corresponding Rei-on-top scene at the end, it's a metaphor for the forced intimacy of Complementation.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Nov 21, 2012 5:01 pm I agree it's a metaphor in EoE. Nothing else really makes sense. Even if one were to argue Shinji and Asuka had sex in the TV series (as apparently one just did), it would NOT be between 22 and 23. Asuka get mind raped in 22, gets a major self-esteem drop in 23, and attempts suicide in 24 (which might have been more of a cry for help than anything else). There is no room for Shinji to get it on with Asuka between those episodes. If an idea like that were in Groundworks because it was in the pre-production phases of the show, it was either in preparation for the metaphoric EoE scenes or simply cut from the TV episodes early simply because there was no room for it in the show's emotional logic.

[]:             Quote Post by Tribblepoo » Fri Nov 23, 2012 9:56 pm June wrote: Shinji and Asuka's happy hour just turned into the Schrodinger's Cat dilemma.
